creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
xerces-c3 has a CONFLICTS with xerces-c2-[0-9]*, but neither textproc/xerces-c2 nor textproc/xerces-c2-devel conflict with each other nor -c3.

Fix: 

Add a CONFLICTS line to the -c2* ports.
How-To-Repeat: Install kdepim which depends on -c3, then install games/megaglest which depends on -c2.  Files from -c3 will be overwritten.
